## Summary

<!-- What does this change do, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (PATCH)
- [ ] New backward-compatible functionality (MINOR)
- [ ] Breaking change to public API / output / formats (MAJOR)
- [ ] Documentation only

## Checklist

- [ ] Geometry changes verified against `docs/math.md` within 1e-9 relative / 0.001 mm absolute error
- [ ] Tests added or updated (including edge cases)
- [ ] No network access, telemetry, or credentials introduced
- [ ] No dependencies added outside the approved list (or flagged for discussion)
- [ ] Layering respected (no geometry in GUI, no GUI imports below the app layer)
- [ ] If a release: README.md, ChangeLog.md, pyproject.toml, and `__version__` updated together
